toolRequests.name: bash

arguments.command:
for pkg in "System.Text.Json" "Azure.Storage.Blobs" "Microsoft.Extensions.Logging" "Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" "Microsoft.AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson" "xunit" "OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting"; do
  lower=$(echo "$pkg" | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]')
  ver=$(curl -s "https://api.nuget.org/v3-flatcontainer/${lower}/index.json" | python3 -c "
import sys, json
data = json.load(sys.stdin)
versions = [v for v in data['versions'] if all(c not in v for c in ['-'])]
print(versions[-1] if versions else 'N/A')
" 2>/dev/null)
  echo "$pkg: $ver"
done
arguments.description: Fetch latest stable NuGet package versions

toolRequests.intentionSummary: Fetch latest stable NuGet package versions

| Package | Before | After |
|---|---|---|

| `Azure.Storage.Blobs` (Legacy) | 12.19.0 hardcoded | **$(BlobsVersion)** → 12.27.0 |
| `AspNetCore.Mvc.NewtonsoftJson` (net8.0) | 8.0.11 | **8.0.26** |
| `OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting` | 1.15.0 | **1.15.3** |
